query: SELECT id, name, status, totalContacts, completedCalls, answeredCalls, failedCalls, startedAt, completedAt, cpsLimit, maxConcurrentCalls, retryAttempts, contactListId, callerIdNumber, callerIdName, voice, scriptId, pacingMode, useDidRotation, createdAt, updatedAt FROM campaigns ORDER BY updatedAt DESC LIMIT 5;
